summary: DEMO-1 login slice. The happy path (TC-001) passes. TC-002 found a real product bug: the invalid-password error shows "Wrong password!" instead of the agreed "Invalid credentials" (RISK-002, high) — BUG-001 drafted. RISK-003 (logout clears the session) has no test case in this run and is surfaced as uncovered. Recommendation: fail — a high-severity risk has a confirmed product bug.
release_recommendation_reasoning: TC-002 confirmed a product bug on a high-severity risk (RISK-002): the invalid-password error copy is wrong ("Wrong password!" vs the agreed "Invalid credentials"). A confirmed product bug on a high-severity risk is release-blocking, so this is a fail, not a conditional_pass. Separately, RISK-003 (logout clears the session) is uncovered (medium) and should get a test case, but the blocking reason is the confirmed bug. Fix BUG-001 (correct the error copy), re-run, and re-evaluate.
open_questions: RISK-003 (logout) is uncovered (medium) — add a test case or formally accept the risk.
Is "Invalid credentials" the final, localized copy, or a placeholder? (Recorded as a non-blocking ambiguity at Gate 1.)
